headline: How Chipotle’s Chipotlane Expansion, Profit Dip And Buybacks At Chipotle Mexican Grill (CMG) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: In the first quarter of 2026, Chipotle Mexican Grill reported revenue of US$3,088.24 million versus US$2,875.25 million a year earlier, while net income fell to US$302.82 million from US$386.60 million as the company continued aggressive expansion and completed a US$805.21 million share repurchase program. Alongside plans to open 350 to 370 new restaurants in 2026, most with higher-margin Chipotlanes, Chipotle is bringing in high-profile marketing and digital leaders, signaling a push to...

headline: Dutch Bros' Food Rollout Gains Scale: Can It Lift Frequency?
summary: BROS expands food to 485 shops in Q1 2026, with low-teens attach rates and an approximate 4% systemwide comparable-sales benefit.

headline: High gas prices are hurting restaurant sales — but not all chains
summary: Restaurant traffic fell 2.3% in March compared with the year-ago period, according to Black Box Intelligence.
